claims.claim: frontmatter code_ref pipecat tts_service.py:64 anchors the text-aggregation mode (SENTENCE/TOKEN) concept
claims.found: line 64 is 'class TTSContext:' (append_to_context/push_assistant_aggregation dataclass), unrelated to aggregation mode

claims.claim: frontmatter code_ref elevenlabs/tts.py:498 anchors the TOKEN/auto_mode latency comment
claims.found: line 498 begins the comment block: '# By default, we aggregate sentences before sending to TTS. This adds # ~200-300ms of latency per sentence ... Setting text_aggregation_mode=TextAggregationMode.TOKEN streams tokens directly. To use this mode, you must set auto_mode=False ... eliminates aggregation time, but slows down ElevenLabs.'

claims.claim: base_text_aggregator.py:20-25 defines SENTENCE, TOKEN, WORD modes
claims.found: line 20 'class AggregationType(StrEnum):' with SENTENCE='sentence' (23), TOKEN='token' (24), WORD='word' (25)

claims.claim: In TOKEN mode SimpleTextAggregator yields each token immediately with no buffering (simple_text_aggregator.py:64-67)
claims.found: lines 64-67: 'if self._aggregation_type == AggregationType.TOKEN: / if text: / yield Aggregation(text=text, type=AggregationType.TOKEN) / return'

claims.claim: auto_mode docstring: reduces latency by disabling server-side chunk scheduling and buffering, recommended for complete sentences (elevenlabs/tts.py:472-478)
claims.found: lines 472-478: 'auto_mode: Whether to enable ElevenLabs' auto mode, which reduces latency by disabling server-side chunk scheduling and buffering. Recommended when sending complete sentences or phrases. When None (default), auto mode is enabled for SENTENCE aggregation and disabled for TOKEN aggregation — because token streaming relies on the server-side chunk scheduler to accumulate enough text...'
lines 591-592: 'if auto_mode is None: / auto_mode = self._text_aggregation_mode != TextAggregationMode.TOKEN'

claims.claim: sentence aggregation adds ~200-300ms latency per sentence; TOKEN eliminates aggregation time but slows ElevenLabs (elevenlabs/tts.py:498-503)
claims.found: comment at 498-503 verbatim: '~200-300ms of latency per sentence ... To use this mode, you must set auto_mode=False. This eliminates aggregation time, but slows down ElevenLabs.'

claims.claim: LiveKit BufferedTokenStream enforces min_token_len/min_sentence_len floor (~20 chars), attributed to [[TTS-03-sentence-aggregation]]
claims.found: claim deferred to neighbor note TTS-03; not directly substantiated within TTS-09 and no LiveKit clone path cited here

summary: All seven Pipecat code_refs in the body are accurate and the ElevenLabs comment/docstring quotes are verbatim. One frontmatter code_ref (tts_service.py:64) points at class TTSContext instead of TextAggregationMode (line 80) / default-SENTENCE logic (line 272-273) — MISCITED. together-talk is listed as the only source but the substantive numbers (200-300ms) come from the Pipecat code comment, correctly cited inline; together-talk's own 200-300ms figure is TTFT, not aggregation cost. No WRONG claims.
